2256510.name: Stalhart
2256510.description:
A deer awakens in a peaceful forest, but something is deeply wrong. As he leaps through a fractured world where nature and machines collide, he must uncover the truth behind his mysterious surroundings, and himself.

Stalhart is a cinematic puzzle-platformer, a moving tale of instinct and courage. It is the debut title from PARA, a two-person team driven by a love for storytelling and nature.

Key Features:

  • PLAY AS A DEER. Leap with agility across danger, smash through obstacles with your antlers, and sprint through a mysterious, reactive world.

  • HAUNTINGLY BEAUTIFUL WORLD. Explore a stylized landscape where whimsical nature collides with cold, menacing machinery.

  • DYNAMIC PERSPECTIVES. Shift seamlessly between side-scrolling platforming and fast-paced runner sequences.

  • PUZZLES WITH PURPOSE. Solve challenges that demand observation, timing, and creative thinking.

  • STEALTH AND SURVIVAL. Outsmart menacing mechanical enemies using stealth, speed, and sharp instinct.

  • WORDLESS STORYTELLING. Experience a carefully paced blend of action and emotion in a wordless tale of identity, instinct, and courage.
